title: Network Discovery
subtitle: Automatically discover assets in the network

scan.ipRangeHelp: Private RFC-1918 ranges only · Maximum /24 (254 hosts)
scan.scanProgress: TCP connection test in progress… (max. ~15 seconds for /24)
scan.scanInfo: The scan tests open TCP ports (SSH, HTTP/S, RDP, SMB, MySQL, …) — no root / no nmap required. Reverse DNS is used for hostnames.
scan.noActiveHosts: No active hosts found. Check CIDR range or ports.

agent.step1Desc: Save the script on the target system
agent.step2Desc: Replace the placeholder DEIN-JWT-TOKEN in the script file with your token (Profile → top right)
agent.windowsDetected: Installed software from registry (HKLM + HKCU Uninstall keys), hostname, IP, OS version
agent.linuxDebDetected: dpkg-query: all installed packages with version and maintainer
agent.linuxRpmDetected: rpm -qa: all installed packages with version and vendor
agent.assetMatchingDesc: New software lands in the Approval Queue — an admin can check each entry individually and approve it as an asset or ignore it. If an asset with an identical name already exists, only the version will be updated.
agent.cveMatchingDesc: After import, a precise CVE search can be automatically started for each detected asset using "auto-resolve CPE" or OSV.dev package name.

staged.noItems: No entries in this view. Run a network scan or start the discovery agent.

messages.loadFailed: Could not load software to be approved
messages.approveSuccess: Software approved and added to assets.
messages.confirmDeleteSingle: Are you sure you want to delete this entry?
messages.bulkDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} entries?
messages.scanSuccess: {{found}} active host(s) found in {{scanned}} checked addresses.
messages.importSuccessWithSkipped: {{created}} host(s) submitted for approval ({{skipped}} already exists/ignored).
